TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Malepa ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 200 buwan, 645 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 625 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 20 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 93%, Setik 2%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Malepa hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Malepa hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Malepa hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Malepa hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Malepa hya' ga bubun. tay mkyahu' na Malepa hya' ga kobah. tay 'zil na Malepa hya' ga bayi. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ malepa ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕetik *%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na malepa ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na malepa ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na malepa ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na malepa ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na malepa ħjaʔ ɣa βuβun. taj mkjaħuʔ na malepa ħjaʔ ɣa koβaħ. taj ʔzil na malepa ħjaʔ ɣa βaji. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Malepa ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 200 buwan, 645 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 625 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 20 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 93%, Setik 2%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Malepa hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Malepa hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Malepa hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Malepa hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Malepa hya' ga bubun. tay mkyahu' na Malepa hya' ga kobah. tay 'zil na Malepa hya' ga bayi. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ malepa ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕetik *%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na malepa ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na malepa ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na malepa ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na malepa ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na malepa ħjaʔ ɣa βuβun. taj mkjaħuʔ na malepa ħjaʔ ɣa koβaħ. taj ʔzil na malepa ħjaʔ ɣa βaji. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
